title: Entity spawn burst
symptoms: spawner.spawn_wave instantiates many entities in one frame
spawn wave or instantiate burst stalls the frame
hitch when a wave, salvo or particle burst is created at once
instantiation cost concentrated in a single frame
mechanism: A large number of entities are instantiated in a single frame (a spawn wave), and the construction, allocation and scene insertion all land in one frame.
diagnosis_hints: Check whether the spike coincides with a gameplay event that creates many objects; count the instances created in the hitch frame.
typical_fixes: pool and reuse instances instead of creating them on the fly
build expensive sub-objects lazily or ahead of time
